---
title: "{{title}}"
author: "{{author}}"
date: today
place: "{{place}}"
organization: "{{organization}}"
lang: fr
format:
  compte-rendu-html: default
  compte-rendu-pdf: default
  compte-rendu-typst: default
---

::: participants
**Présents :** {{participants}}

**Excusés :**
:::

::: agenda
1. ...
2. ...
:::

::: body
## Premier point

...
:::

::: decisions
- ...
:::

::: actions
| Action | Responsable | Échéance |
|--------|-------------|---------|
| ...    | ...         | ...     |
:::

::: next-meeting
...
:::

::: approval
{{author}}
:::
